reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Pero al ser la única estación en la zona, en reiteradas ocasiones hay que esperar  que el camion recarguen combustible.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. But since it's the only station in the area, you often have to wait for the truck to refuel.

reviews.comment:
Un desastre. No atienden y si es el cambio de turno te clavarás hasta que los empleados se dignen a mover la osamenta. En este lugar el ACA atrasa 30 años.

(Translated by Google)
A disaster. They don't answer, and if it's shift change, you'll be stuck there until the employees deign to move a muscle. This place is 30 years behind the times.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtX3FpamhBRRAB
